description: Cruise your way to the college with this Cruiser backpack from wildcraft. Its a perfect daily bag for the office as well with its dedicated padded pocket for your laptop. Height:42 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 15 cm Warranty: 5 years Made of polyester with nylon lining Embroidered branding on the front Two main zippered compartments with one compartment with a padded laptop holder and other with organizer pouches One zipper compartment on the front Has an ear phone opening on the front Mesh pockets on the sides Adjustable and padded shoulder straps with click lock buckles Padded back for an ergonomic Fit along the spine Fabric, padded haul loop Care Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean clothWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
